messages.content:
Now I'll extract and map all 14 customer records from the CSV using the doc-data-extractor schema rules.

**CSV Column Mapping:**
- `FirstName` → `firstName`
- `LastName` → `lastName`
- `Phone No` → `phone` (E.164)
- `UserCode` → `externalCustomerId`
- `CenterName` → `customAttributes.centerName` + used to populate `primaryLocationId`
- `membershipname` → `activeMembershipTier`
- `LastVisit` → `lastVisitDate` (ISO 8601)
- `guestIconInformation` → `customAttributes.guestIconInformation`



Now saving all 14 records one by one:

---

**14 records saved successfully.**

Here's a full summary of what was processed and persisted:

| # | Name | UserCode | Phone (E.164) | Last Visit | Membership |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Alan Zilberman | PP-G-100322 | +18482379390 | 2023-10-05 | — |
| 2 | Joel Santos | PP-G-100415 | +17322596717 | 2023-12-06 | — |
| 3 | Clifford Oyugi | PP-G-101246 | +17327660180 | 2025-02-02 | — |
| 4 | Melinda Trang | PP-G-100370 | +19178423563 | 2023-11-10 | — |
| 5 | Tim Smith | PP-G-100433 | +17327105061 | 2023-12-09 | — |
| 6 | Rosario DiPollina | PP-G-101526 | +18604280020 | 2025-08-22 | — |
| 7 | Ryan Shellhammer | PP-G-100192 | +19083070560 | 2026-03-28 | Silver Membership |
| 8 | Ryan Garrie | PP-G-101410 | +17187448290 | 2026-03-06 | — |
| 9 | John Buechel | PP-G-100411 | +19735254268 | 2024-09-13 | two lessons 8 hr practice |
| 10 | Spencer Grossman | PP-G-100956 | +12152044546 | — | — |
| 11 | Carson Pryor | PP-G-101294 | +13149607040 | 2025-02-22 | — |
| 12 | Brian Oni | PP-G-100196 | +19088121138 | 2025-12-30 | — |
| 13 | Jamie Reilly | PP-G-101669 | +18488280678 | — | — |
| 14 | Sayaka Carpenter | PP-G-100611 | *(none provided)* | 2025-05-21 | — |

**Notes on data handling:**
- All phones normalized to **E.164 format**
- All dates converted to **ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD)**
- `firstName` for "clifford" and "sayaka" were title-cased
- `CenterName` ("New Brunswick") was stored in both `primaryLocationId` and `customAttributes.centerName`
- Missing fields defaulted per schema rules (`""`, `0`, `false`, `[]`, `{}`)
